source_pr.title: statistics: support building CMSketch with Top N
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/10042 has about 600 lines, this pr picks out the core logic except that related to protobuf and storage.

### What is changed and how it works?



### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Related changes

https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/10042

symptoms: + // Avoid potential data race | zipf := rand.NewZipf(rand.New(rand.NewSource(seed)), s, 1, imax) (statistics/cmsketch_test.go)
failure_signature: + // Avoid potential data race | zipf := rand.NewZipf(rand.New(rand.NewSource(seed)), s, 1, imax) (statistics/cmsketch_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: + // Avoid potential data race | zipf := rand.NewZipf(rand.New(rand.NewSource(seed)), s, 1, imax) (statistics/cmsketch_test.go)

files: statistics/cmsketch.go, statistics/cmsketch_test.go, statistics/estimate.go, statistics/feedback.go, statistics/feedback_test.go, statistics/handle/update.go, statistics/update.go, statistics/update_test.go
